assets.name: lecture_05_figure_01.png
assets.rationale: None of the candidates contain blackboard mathematics, diagrams, or lecture-room layout useful for note writing. They are campus establishing shots and a Stanford University title card, so they should be rejected for the chapter’s visual evidence set.

assets.name: lecture_05_figure_04.png
assets.rationale: This frame gives the clearest and most complete view of the blackboard mathematics in this subtitle window. Unlike candidate 01, it actually shows the relevant equations; unlike candidates 03 and 04, the lecturer obscures less of the board. It is the most useful frame for reconstructing the ground-state discussion.
